summary: Iteration 24 - Payment/subscription fixes verified. All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests confirmed PRO+ plan displays correctly on PricingPage and Settings page. Welcome toast appears after payment success.

plans_sync_endpoint.description: Syncs user subscription status from Stripe or payment_success records

plans_current_endpoint.description: Returns current plan info including trial_used field
plans_current_endpoint.trial_used_field: Present and returns boolean (false for test user)

get_user_effective_plan.fallback_logic: Trusts stored plan if stripe_customer_id exists (for webhook timing issues)

pricing_page_current_plan.description: PricingPage shows 'Your current plan' button for PRO+ card

settings_page_plan_display.description: Settings page shows 'Current plan: PRO+' with 'Active' badge

payment_success_toast.description: Welcome toast 'Welcome to KOLO Pro+! 🎉' appears after ?upgrade=success redirect
payment_success_toast.url_cleanup: URL is cleaned after processing upgrade=success parameter

backend_api_tests: ✓ effective_plan correctly identified for test user
frontend_ui_tests: ✓ PRO+ card shows 'Your current plan' button (grayed out)
✓ Settings page shows 'Current plan: PRO+' with 'Active' badge
✓ URL is cleaned after processing upgrade=success

context_for_next_testing_agent: All payment/subscription fixes verified. Test user test@test.com has PRO+ plan with active subscription. Key endpoints: /api/plans/sync (POST) syncs subscription from Stripe, /api/plans/current (GET) returns plan info with trial_used field. PricingPage correctly shows 'Your current plan' for user's effective plan. Settings page shows plan with Active badge. Welcome toast appears after payment success redirect (?upgrade=success).
